title: Task
description: A single node in a Plan. Describes one unit of work assigned to one expert sub-agent role. See conclave-spec.md §6.1.

description.description: Plain-English instruction the sub-agent receives. Be specific about scope; the sub-agent will not re-plan.

requiredCapabilities.description: Least-privilege capability tokens this task needs (e.g. read:repo, run:tests). The runtime refuses to dispatch if the assigned agent lacks any of these.

riskTier.description: Maximum risk tier any action under this task may reach. T3/T4 require human ratification before enactment. See approval-gate skill.

successCriteria.description: Machine- or human-checkable definition of done. Used by the Reviewer/Planner to accept the TaskResult.

dependsOn.description: Other task ids that must complete first. Redundant with Plan.edges; kept for sub-agent local reading.

inputs.description: Free-form structured inputs the sub-agent reads.

expectedArtifacts.description: Paths (relative to runs/<runId>/artifacts/) the sub-agent is expected to produce.

modelHint.description: Optional preference (e.g. 'claude-opus', 'gpt-5', 'local-qwen'). The runtime treats this as a hint only.

recoverabilityPlan.description: For T3/T4: how this task's effects can be undone if needed.
